scan.verdict.verified.title: ✅ Verified
scan.verdict.verified.message: This product has been verified as authentic. Batch: {batch_no}, Expires: {expiry_date}.
scan.verdict.suspicious.title: ⚠️ Suspicious
scan.verdict.suspicious.message: This product could not be fully verified. Please cross-check with your pharmacist before use.
scan.verdict.expired.title: ❌ Expired
scan.verdict.expired.message: This batch expired on {expiry_date}. Do not use this product.
scan.verdict.unknown.title: ❓ Unknown
scan.verdict.unknown.message: We could not retrieve enough data to verify this product. Please consult your pharmacist.
allergen.warning.title: ⚠️ Allergen Alert
allergen.warning.message: This product contains {allergens}, which you have listed as an allergy.
interaction.found.title: ⚠️ Drug Interaction Detected
interaction.found.message: Taking {drug_a} together with {drug_b} may cause {severity} interactions. Please consult your doctor.
interaction.contraindicated.message: Do NOT take {drug_a} with {drug_b}. This combination is contraindicated.
whatsapp.welcome: Welcome to TrustLens! Send a photo of any medicine or grocery product barcode to verify it.
whatsapp.send_image_prompt: Please send a clear photo of the barcode or QR code on the product.
whatsapp.error.generic: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again or type HELP.
whatsapp.help:
Commands:
• Send a photo: scan barcode
• Type a barcode number: look up directly
• HELP: show this menu
error.product_not_found: Product not found in our database.
error.barcode_unreadable: Could not read the barcode. Please try a clearer photo with good lighting.
error.service_unavailable: Our verification service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a few minutes.
fssai.invalid: ⚠️ FSSAI licence {license_no} could not be verified.
fssai.missing: ⚠️ No FSSAI licence number found on this product.
onboarding.welcome:
👋 Welcome to *TrustLens*!

I can verify medicines and grocery products for authenticity, expiry, allergens, and fake labels — all over WhatsApp, no app needed.

Let's set up your profile first. What's your name?
onboarding.ask_diet:
Thanks, {name}! 🥗

What's your dietary preference?
Reply: *veg*, *vegan*, *non-veg*, *jain*, or *halal*
onboarding.ask_allergies:
Got it! Do you have any food allergies or intolerances?

Examples: peanuts, milk, gluten, eggs
Or reply *none* to skip.
onboarding.ask_medicines:
Almost done! Do you take any regular medicines?

Examples: Metformin, Aspirin, Amlodipine
Or reply *none* to skip.

_I'll flag drug interactions when you scan a new medicine._
onboarding.complete:
✅ You're all set, {name}!

📸 Send me a photo of any medicine or grocery barcode to get started.
💬 Or type a barcode number directly.
onboarding.invalid_diet:
I didn't catch that. Please reply with one of:
*veg*, *vegan*, *non-veg*, *jain*, or *halal*
